expectations.text: Output includes a coverage matrix mapping design elements to test cases
expectations.evidence: coverage_matrix.md contains detailed tables mapping every design element (behavior rules, interfaces, configuration, internal state) to specific test case names, organized by strategy.

expectations.text: Every behavior rule (startup clamping, cruise rate-of-change, emergency shutdown, was_clamped flag) has at least one test
expectations.evidence: Startup clamping: test_startup_mode_clamps_to_startup_min_rate, test_startup_mode_clamps_to_startup_max_rate. Cruise ROC: test_cruise_mode_rate_of_change_limiting, test_cruise_mode_rate_of_change_decrease_limiting. Emergency: test_emergency_shutdown_sets_rate_to_zero. was_clamped: test_invariant_was_clamped_iff_actual_differs_from_requested, test_invariant_was_not_clamped_iff_actual_equals_requested.

expectations.text: Every error_handling entry (negative rate, negative elapsed_time, unrecognized mode) has a dedicated test
expectations.evidence: Negative rate: test_negative_requested_rate_treated_as_zero (line 462). Negative elapsed_time: test_negative_elapsed_time_treated_as_zero (line 486). Unrecognized mode: test_unrecognized_operational_mode_treated_as_emergency (line 497).

expectations.text: Boundary values tested for requested_rate (0.0, negative, at STARTUP_MIN, at STARTUP_MAX, at CRUISE_MAX)
expectations.evidence: 0.0: test_requested_rate_at_minimum_boundary (line 341). Negative: test_requested_rate_just_below_minimum_boundary (line 349). At STARTUP_MIN (10.0): test_startup_at_min_boundary (line 357). At STARTUP_MAX (50.0): test_startup_at_max_boundary (line 375). At CRUISE_MAX (200.0): test_cruise_at_max_boundary (line 387).

expectations.text: No test uses 'assert does not raise' or 'assert no exception' as its only assertion
expectations.evidence: All tests assert specific output values (actual_rate, was_clamped, clamping_reason). No test uses only 'does not raise' or 'no exception' patterns.

expectations.text: Test names describe the scenario being tested, not just the method name
expectations.evidence: Test names are descriptive: test_startup_mode_clamps_to_startup_min_rate, test_cruise_mode_rate_of_change_limiting, test_negative_requested_rate_treated_as_zero, test_invariant_was_clamped_iff_actual_differs_from_requested, etc.

expectations.text: Stateful behavior tested: rate-of-change limiting requires multiple sequential calls
expectations.evidence: test_cruise_mode_rate_of_change_limiting (line 199): sets previous_rate=100.0 then calls with 200.0 over 100ms. test_full_startup_to_cruise_transition (line 594): three sequential calls across mode transitions. test_implicit_fault_rapid_successive_calls (line 528): two sequential calls verifying state updates.

expectations.text: Configuration variants tested: at least one test with non-default config values
expectations.evidence: test_implicit_fault_configuration_zero_values (line 575) uses non-default config: startup_min_rate=0.0, startup_max_rate=1.0, cruise_max_rate=0.1, max_rate_change=0.01. Multiple other tests also explicitly pass non-default config values to FuelRateLimiter constructor.
